sentence: 爸爸每个月都能领到退休金。
pinyin: Bàba měi ge yuè dōu néng lǐng dào tuì xiū jīn.
english: Dad receives his pension every month.

sentence: 她每天练习小提琴一个小时。
pinyin: Tā měitiān liànxí xiǎotíqín yī gè xiǎoshí.
english: She practices the violin for one hour every day.

meaning: 1. to settle; 2. to set up home
pinyin: Tāmen juédìng zài Chéngdū luò hù.
english: They decided to settle down in Chengdu.

sentence: 核能是一种低碳的发电方式。
pinyin: Hé néng shì yī zhǒng dī tàn de fā diàn fāng shì.
english: Nuclear energy is a low-carbon way of generating electricity.

sentence: 听到这首老歌，她开始怀旧了。
pinyin: Tīng dào zhè shǒu lǎo gē, tā kāishǐ huáijiù le.
english: Hearing this old song, she started feeling nostalgic.
